顶级的爽就是没有外挂还能走到高处见到最美的风景，谁说没有外挂就不能走向巅峰？
问苍茫大地，谁主沉浮。
这辈子只喝最烈的酒，只泡最靓的妞！一辈子几十年，只想要活得肆意潇洒，心灵通透，不让自己憋屈，只要自己舒畅就行。
“酒色权财”成年人不做选择题——我全都要
如果只有钱没有美女——钱将变得毫无意义
建国（结合历史非胡扯）
世界首富？这是一个财阀和家族主导的世界。
世界纷纷扰扰，S3前的备战，主角的命运将何去何从？
逻辑严谨无脑残黑洞，就此开启波澜壮阔的人生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f742655ac324897455ad99b1cf2eb19a","author":"苍天是狗","author_id":"","book_id":"7285980500328451072","book_name":"重生之世界级财阀","book_short_name":"重生之财途","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7285980806458114575","read_count":"28568","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1721152"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"832","tags":"都市种田,都市,重生,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f2162cd312ff609cb2dd66ec86cd5a52~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253027&x-signature=TCwzGHD%2BRF2OBSgtcWbuO6iwty4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2463368896063469","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1399"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321125706A3D9A64ED55BBD122858"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读116小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":348844,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":418628,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":5151},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7493995 4510","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"讲真，不太喜欢这种意识流的写作手法，天马行空太跳跃，可能是年龄代沟吧，游戏部份没玩过，完全看不懂。[捂脸][捂脸]从爽文角度，涉及到诸多敏感话题写到这个程度而且不被和谐，作者分寸拿捏得很好，仅此一点必须五星好评。
看过太多重生文，大多无脑爽，地名、人名、单位名遮遮掩掩照样被下架，其实拿无脑爽文和本文相比多少有些侮辱作者，眼光格局热点事件真实还原度就不用说了、远超同类文学作品，主张家国情怀的同时不回避现实中的不足而且敢于披露，不一味的圣母心，还能做到整体故事逻辑通畅有始有终。当然，如果拿着放大镜看就算我没说。
最后，从纯粹爽文角度来说，本文不算太爽，前半部与后半部跨度太大。也知不知道作者创作途中经历了什么，纯属个人猜测。通读下来，感觉作者三观很正，没有非黑即白，思想上也没有明显站队，算是个一部难得的小说，期待作者后续作品。","text_exts":[{"e":195,"s":191,"text":"家国情怀","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%AE%B6%E5%9B%BD%E6%83%85%E6%80%80&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774069027BD122858%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227488315448283464510%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227285980500328451072%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%AE%B6%E5%9B%BD%E6%83%85%E6%80%80%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743512259,"group_id":"7285980500328451072","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0J0O6YHsJRqvI/dPvqPU0g=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"690128583662451","user_name":"虾仁虾大爷"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"690128583662451","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7285980500328451072","book_info":{"abstract":"【重生】+【无系统无强化】+【多女主】+【建立瓦格纳军团】+【建国】+【非病娇】+【商业赚钱】+【青春校园】
